metadata.title: Surprise Mid Rush Turns Into a Clean Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch how a quick mid push catches the enemies off guard and secures two fast kills. Timing and steady aim made this play stand out.
What’s your go-to mid strategy?

Drop your best clutch moments below!

Have a clutch like this? Share your best plays in the comments!
